answers.answer: jet-workspace.yaml > package.json.workspaces > pnpm-workspace.yaml. Jet's own format always takes precedence; pnpm-workspace.yaml is the lowest-priority fallback.
Parse both packages: glob array AND catalog:/catalogs: fields from pnpm-workspace.yaml. Wire catalog support in this change, not a follow-up.
Relative symlinks (like pnpm). Compute relative path from node_modules/<pkg-name> to the workspace package directory.
Recursive install. When jet install runs at workspace root, iterate all discovered workspace packages and install each one's external (non-workspace) deps. One command installs everything.
Record workspace packages in jet-lock.yaml with workspace: true flag + relative path + resolved semver version. Full traceability.
